Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sacred Valley]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — Sacred Valley is a location where clans conduct Spiritual Origin tests for their children.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Sacred Valley is the location where orus fruit grows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Sacred Valley is home to almost a million people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The Wei clan carved out a section of wilderness in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Any child of Sacred Valley can recite the definition of sacred arts on command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Sacred Valley is the destination for Suriel's course to the fated violation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — The clans of Sacred Valley hold a festival every seven years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Sacred Valley is a location where sacred artists reside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Li Markuth intends to claim the whole of Sacred Valley as his personal territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Sacred Valley was destroyed by a monstrous creature that waded through the mountains and buried it in earth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Sacred Valley is a place where Jade is considered the greatest height and anyone below Gold is considered powerless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Sacred Valley is a paradise located within a mountain range.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Sacred Valley is protected by weather, terrain, inhospitable surrounding regions, ancient legend, and significant individuals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 13''' — Sacred Valley is a region that many believe contains all settlements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Sacred Valley is surrounded by wild and untamed land.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — The land outside Sacred Valley is inhabited by barbarian nomads who have tamed sacred beasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Sacred Valley is a location mentioned by Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon needs to get out of Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Sacred Valley is a location Lindon marched out of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's guidance is needed to escape Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon considers that staying in Sacred Valley might have benefits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin believes Sacred Valley is too soft.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is more powerful than any Jade in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Sacred Valley uses a test involving a bowl of liquid madra.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Sacred Valley is a location where Yerin was more capable than anyone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Sacred Valley is a location where medical care can be found.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Life in Sacred Valley had not been easy for an Unsouled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Sacred Valley is a location where Elder Whisper's tower is situated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Sacred Valley is a location where Unsouled carrying fortunes are targets for robbery.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Sacred Valley is the place where Lindon received his education.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — Sacred Valley is considered civilized compared to the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Sacred Valley uses shadesilk for trading with the outside world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Sacred Valley is a location where Jade-stage practitioners can use spirit sensing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — The term 'Unsouled' has no meaning outside of Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Sacred Valley is the home of the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The door is connected to Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan's badge is larger than badges used in Sacred Valley.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Sacred Valley is home to Soulsmiths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Sacred Valley is a place where the Wei and Li clash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan was unable to save Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Sacred Valley has towns and cities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The land outside Sacred Valley is widely accepted to be untamed and barbaric.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Sacred Valley is a location mentioned in relation to the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Sacred Valley lies to the west.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin previously fought a Remnant of her master in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin's bones would be rotting in Sacred Valley if she waited to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — A creature is destined to attack Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Sacred Valley is a location where Jades reside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin lost her master's voice in Sacred Valley almost a year ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon and Yerin left Sacred Valley.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon grew up in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Sacred Valley is a location where Lindon was previously located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Sacred Valley is considered one of the safest places in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Sacred Valley fabricated the concept of an Unsouled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Sacred Valley is located far to the west, past the Desolate Wilds.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Sacred Valley is a location Lindon has been away from for a year and a half.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon lived in Sacred Valley.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The imperial capital might be the size of the entire Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Sacred Valley is a location Lindon mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Sacred Valley contains areas that are dangerous.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Suriel showed Lindon the Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Sacred Valley is a place where night is bright due to Samara's Ring.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The people of Sacred Valley live in Akura territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Dreadgods can be allowed into Sacred Valley by Monarchs.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The people of Sacred Valley would strike a Jade dead if they stepped into the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The sacred instruments in the hall were destroyed by time and a curse in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Sacred Valley is a location where people follow ancient traditions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Sacred Valley contains a massive script formation buried deep within the earth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The script formation in Sacred Valley generates a suppression field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Sacred Valley is the birthplace of the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Sacred Valley suppresses madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Sacred Valley contains the Ancestor’s Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The fate of Sacred Valley is being decided by the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — The Dreadgod intends to head for Sacred Valley upon waking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sacred Valley is Lindon's birthplace.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — A Dreadgod is heading toward Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon wants to save Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Sacred Valley needs to be safe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Sacred Valley is a territory that needs evacuation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Sacred Valley is under threat from an axe-like force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Sacred Valley is subject to a suppression field that keeps its people from growing beyond Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon and his companions are preparing to return to Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Sacred Valley is a location that needs to be made safe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Sacred Valley is a location surrounded by a suppression field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Sacred Valley has an eastern entrance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Sacred Valley has a boundary in front of it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — A great disaster is coming to destroy Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The suppression field of Sacred Valley can interfere with contracts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Sacred Valley is a location containing three of the most powerful people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Sacred Valley is a location Orthos has been in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon was in Sacred Valley before leaving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon intends to take his family away from Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Sacred Valley has a northern exit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Sacred Valley is a location Lindon studied as a child.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Sacred Valley contains four schools and three clans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Sacred Valley is a location where the Li clan resides.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Sacred Valley is a location where the characters are currently located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Sacred Valley contains a curse that leaves people little better than Jades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The guard assumes the visitors are inhabitants of Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Sacred Valley is a location where Yerin's madra had difficulty supporting her body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Sacred Valley is a location that the Wandering Titan might pass through.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Sacred Valley contains various Paths and is subject to a suppressive field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Sacred Valley experienced a quake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Sacred Valley is a location that contains the Holy Wind School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Sacred Valley is a location where a fight occurred or will occur.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — People are fleeing from the encroaching threat in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Sacred Valley is a location with an exit and clan buildings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses his fortress' cloud to form a ramp for Sacred Valley citizens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — People were flooding out of Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Sacred Valley is a location where shadow madra was seen leaping into the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Sacred Valley has a field that suppresses Monarch might.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Titan was being drawn away from Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Sacred Valley is a location where wind can tear up trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Sacred Valley contains refugees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Titan was seen wading into Sacred Valley in a vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Wandering Titan destroyed Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Wandering Titan has come to Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Sacred Valley was re-settled one building at a time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — People are fleeing Sacred Valley into the forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Techniques thrown into Sacred Valley are weakened by the suppression field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The light over Sacred Valley darkened as the ring was damaged.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Sacred Valley is a location that Yerin's madra entered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Sacred Valley is a location Mercy intends to fly back to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Advancing to Archlord cannot be done in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — The Titan has been in Sacred Valley for a long time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Sacred Valley is a location near a cloud fortress where Eithan and Yerin are located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen did not want to return to Sacred Valley in her current condition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The crowd from Sacred Valley was ushered into the Wilds.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon previously used a rust-red Thousand-Mile Cloud when leaving Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Sacred Valley is a place that Lindon feels has little left to defend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Sacred Valley exerts a suppression on spiritual sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Residents of Sacred Valley found shelter in the town of Refuge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Refugees from Sacred Valley are using a camp in the Desolate Wilds for shelter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan might fly to Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — The people of Sacred Valley are being loaded onto cloudships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Sacred Valley was littered with Remnants after the Dreadgod's rampage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has not had much time to relax since leaving Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin Arelius is expected to return to the Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon and Eithan are hundreds of miles from Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Sacred Valley is a location that will change when the Silent Core is placed in its chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — A wave of power gushed out of Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Emergency gatekeys are being used to cordon off Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Sacred Valley is a land that contains the largest hub of the western labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon's perception is clearest in Sacred Valley when the suppression field is gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Malice was within sight of Sacred Valley after stepping out of the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Sacred Valley is surrounded by four cults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — The people of Sacred Valley are associated with the Jai family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long realized they were heading back to Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The Sacred Valley has badges with the Forger symbol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The Sacred Valley is located near Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Overlords and Archlords are fighting over Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Sacred Valley is a location where powers are clashing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Some pieces of the labyrinth are located in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Sacred Valley is a place where one could die.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The labyrinth is located beneath Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Sacred Valley's center was leveled by a rampaging Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider's cloud fortress hangs over Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon and Dross felt far from Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy has fought the Titan in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Sacred Valley is a location that Lindon cannot yet create a portal to from Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin uses Sacred Valley manners.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Sacred Valley is a location Reigan Shen reflected upon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — There is a barrier around Sacred Valley projected by the great labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Sacred Valley contains three remaining sacred peaks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Sacred Valley is protected by a great script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon returned to Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon was hovering over Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Sacred Valley is located below the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Sacred Valley is a location being targeted by Monarch techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Charity was outside Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Sacred Valley has a southern entrance near a mountain with a red river.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Archlords can fly around Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Sacred Valley was pincered by a shining blood dragon and a star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Sacred Valley is a location Lindon and Malice must back away from if Northstrider wins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Sacred Valley is a location that Suriel claimed Lindon could level on his own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Sacred Valley is a territory Lindon visited via the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Sacred Valley is the location of Lindon's ancestors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The gray-white echoed Titan clashed over Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Sacred Valley is far from Blackflame City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Sacred Valley is undergoing a rebuilding effort.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — A Sacred Valley gesture involves pressing fists against one another and bowing over them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 34''' — Sacred Valley is located far above the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Sacred Valley is a location that can rise from the sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth believes all clans of Sacred Valley will soon belong to him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 39''' — The Spiritual Origin test of Sacred Valley is the subject of an information request.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Kazan and Li clans are no longer among the top ten families in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa flies into Sacred Valley.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
